design_philosophy: Cardless, structural, high-density 'Control Room' layout. Moving away from generic floating white cards to a unified grid system with 1px sharp borders. Brand green is used strategically as an energetic focal point, keeping the rest of the UI monochrome and objective.

accepted.note: Aligned with brand green but tinted for badge/background usage to differentiate from solid primary CTA buttons.

headings.usage: H1/H2 should use tracking-tight (-0.02em). Use for page titles and large metric numbers.

body.usage: Use for all data tables, labels, form inputs, and paragraph text. Ensures high legibility for dense data.

layout_strategy.global: Avoid standard drop shadows (shadow-md). Use border-zinc-200 and solid white backgrounds for surfaces against a very light gray (#FAFAFA) app background. All layout elements should feel locked-in and purposeful.

dashboard.structure: A master CSS grid where sections are separated by borders rather than gaps, creating a cohesive command center look.
dashboard.top_row: 3 Nav Stat blocks (Kunden, Produkte, Angebote). Left-aligned text, large numeric values in Outfit. Bottom border has a 2px hover effect that reveals the brand green (#70c800).
dashboard.main_split: Grid with 12 columns. Col 1-8: 'Letzte Angebote' (Recent Quotes) Table panel. Col 9-12: 'Pipeline Health' (the 5 statuses).
dashboard.pipeline_health: A dense vertical stack inside a single panel. Each status row shows Name, Count, and a custom mini progress bar using the dedicated status colors. Do NOT make them 5 separate floating cards.

customers.header: Integrated search and date filters immediately below the page title, sitting flush with the table. The 'Neuer Kunde' CTA is prominent in brand green.
customers.table: Cardless table. The table header is sticky, bg-white, border-y border-zinc-200. Rows have hover:bg-zinc-50. No vertical borders, only subtle horizontal dividers. Action icons only appear on row hover.
customers.creation_flow: Use shadcn 'Sheet' (Slide-out from right) for the 'Neuer Kunde' form instead of a centered modal. It provides much better vertical scrolling space for the 10 fields and feels premium/enterprise.

badge.style: rounded-md px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold border uppercase tracking-wider

table.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-500 font-manrope font-semibold bg-zinc-50/50 px-4 py-3

development_rules.internationalization: CRITICAL: All visible text MUST be wrapped in the translation function, e.g., {t('dashboard.title')}. Provide descriptive object keys. Never hardcode German or Turkish strings directly in the JSX.
development_rules.testing: All interactive elements, forms, and major panels MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='new-customer-btn', data-testid='dashboard-pipeline-panel', data-testid='filter-search-input').
development_rules.icons: Use lucide-react exclusively. Set strokeWidth={1.5} for a cleaner, more precise industrial look.
development_rules.responsiveness: Ensure the dashboard 12-col grid collapses to a 1-col stack on mobile, placing Pipeline Health below the Recent Quotes table.
